ksa_text: Assess data quality, completeness, consistency, and fitness for analytical use, including data profiling, conformance analysis, and documentation of data quality impacts on analytical conclusions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This task KSA describes execution-level work in Applied Analytics & BI that is not expected of a VP Data Governance (vp tier). The role is responsible for overseeing and directing this work, not performing it directly. Excluded on execution-seniority grounds.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could real-world VP Data Governance practitioners be expected to demonstrate this task KSA in practice, despite the seniority gap?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NewVantage Partners CDO Survey, Wavestone CDAIO Report, and Gartner leadership effectiveness research confirm that vp-tier roles delegate execution responsibilities to appropriate levels rather than owning them directly.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: seniority-based exclusion is consistent with external evidence on vp-tier role expectations. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Execution-level task KSA in Applied Analytics & BI is outside the expected competency scope for a VP Data Governance (vp tier). The role oversees this work; it does not perform it directly.
